mapper.insert: /* insert */ INSERT INTO EMPLOYEE_INSURANCE_SETTINGS (WORKPLACE_MEMBER_ID, USE_NATIONAL_PENSION, USE_HEALTH_INSURANCE, USE_LONG_TERM_CARE, USE_EMPLOYMENT_INSURANCE, USE_INCOME_TAX, TAX_FREE_AMOUNT) VALUES (#{workplaceMemberId}, #{useNationalPension}, #{useHealthInsurance}, #{useLongTermCare}, #{useEmploymentInsurance}, #{useIncomeTax}, #{taxFreeAmount})
